sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCLOG ADD DH_LOG TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCLOG ADD DH_LOG DATETIME2 DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

sql.oracle: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_DH ON AD_FCLOG (DH_LOG DESC)
sql.mssql: CREATE INDEX IDX_FCLOG_DH ON AD_FCLOG (DH_LOG DESC)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODNAT NUMBER(10)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODNAT INT

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODCENCUS NUMBER(10)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODCENCUS INT

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODVEND_PADRAO NUMBER(10)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE AD_FCCONFIG ADD CODVEND_PADRAO INT
